title: Path to Optimal Data Structure Selection
description: A decision flowchart guiding the selection of the optimal data structure based on application requirements.
elements: Candidate Data Structures (Arrays, Lists, Trees, Hash Tables, Heaps)
relationships: Starts by analyzing Problem Requirements, which inform the necessary Key Operations and Data Constraints. These factors lead to a Memory vs. Speed Trade-off evaluation, which is used to narrow down Candidate Data Structures. The process concludes with selecting the Optimal Choice.
